package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for json_indent_in_loop: `json.Indent(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule606NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario606Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule606NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
